executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 74 threat advisories. Of these, 3 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 33 as HIGH risk. 1 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires heightened vigilance with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
